title: When you cancel your Monday Work Management subscription, is your url/account inactive or deleted?
excerpt: Can anyone tell me, if you cancel your Monday Work Management subscription, does your account and account url get deleted or does it just become inactive?  Ie can I at a later date renew the subscription for that account…

posts.author: botsquad (Patrick Fallon)
posts.cookedHtml: Can anyone tell me, if you cancel your Monday Work Management subscription, does your account and account url get deleted or does it just become inactive? Ie can I at a later date renew the subscription for that account and restore the same account with the same url? (Note in this case I don’t care about the boards/data contained within the account, just the account itself).

posts.author: anon29275264 (anon29275264)
posts.cookedHtml: you can cancel the subscription without cancelling the account. It can downgrade to the free plan - though you may need to remove users etc. and certain things in your boards will quit working like formula columns.
